discipline.pooling: all walk-forward OOS folds per symbol-parameter candidate
discipline.symbols: BTC/ETH/SOL evaluated independently; no shared fitted parameters
discipline.regimes: bear/bull/range windows reported from OOS buy-and-hold returns
discipline.risk_test: paired block bootstrap risk-difference test reused from risk_disciplined_beta
discipline.multiple_testing: BH-FDR across symbol x predeclared parameter grid
discipline.safety: read-only; no live trading, orders, wallet, or account path
